name: Invoice: Create

description.en: Generate a professional PDF invoice with line items for services or products. Set buyer details, add items with quantities and prices, and get a shareable invoice URL instantly.
description.de: Erstelle eine professionelle PDF-Rechnung mit Positionen für Dienstleistungen oder Produkte. Gib Käuferdetails ein, füge Artikel mit Mengen und Preisen hinzu und erhalte sofort eine teilbare Rechnungs-URL.

bot: Use this when the user asks to create, generate, or send an invoice. Extract line items with title, quantity, and unit price. Collect buyer name and address if provided.

inputs.name: Line Items

description.en: Array of line items (title, quantity, unitPrice in cents)
description.de: Array von Rechnungspositionen (Titel, Menge, Einzelpreis in Cent)

inputs.bot: Extract each line item from the user's request as a JSON array of objects: {title, quantity, unitPrice}. Unit price is in cents (e.g. 5000 = 50.00).

inputs.name: Notes
inputs.bot: Optional payment terms or notes (e.g. 'Net 14 days').

inputs.name: Buyer Name

description.en: Name of the buyer or company

inputs.bot: Buyer or company name. Extract from context or ask if not provided.

inputs.name: Buyer Address
inputs.bot: Buyer address. Extract from context or ask if not provided.

success.en: Invoice created! Total: {{total}}. View it here: {{invoiceUrl}}
